finding_results.notes: Changed the outing cadence to the last Thursday of the month and aligned the travel and handoff weather language to late October.

finding_results.notes: Kept Earl at eighty-one and made the Korea line explicitly part of the VA-benefit cover story rather than factual provenance for the money.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now frames the Korea explanation as a deliberate lie to Denise, removing the impossible service-timeline implication.

summary: Revised chapter 15 in place to resolve the packet's two HIGH continuity/craft contradictions while preserving the chapter's elegiac structure, cemetery drop, pension pressure, VA lie, and cough reveal.
